metadata.name: Set a Reorder Point for a New Item

description: A new product is being introduced. An inventory planner must set its initial reorder point and safety stock levels in the system.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the new product's details, including forecasted sales and supplier lead time.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gathers the necessary data inputs.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the safety stock level based on demand variability and lead time.

expected_outcome.value: A safety stock of 50 units is calculated.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the reorder point (demand during lead time + safety stock).

expected_outcome.value: A reorder point of 200 units is calculated.

nodes.task_description: Update the product's record in the inventory system with the new reorder point and safety stock values.

expected_outcome.value: The item's replenishment parameters are now set.
